violations.text: Cheese was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
A refrigeration unit was observed in poor repair (not holding adequate ambient temperature). PIC instructed to not store any TCS foods until service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
